subcodes.first_line: Blessed art thou for having attained the presence of the Youth in this station whereon the Most Great Ocean hath been established [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: طوبی لک بما حضرت بین یدی الغلام فی المقام الذی فیه استوی البحر الاعظم علی
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @praise and encouragement, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
